violations.text: Food items packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2026
The floor in the area behind the counter is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2026
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024
